hero.title: Balances, transfers, and drawings—one private exchange workspace.
hero.subtitle: Built for the 759 ecosystem: five tokens, member tiers, ledger-backed movements, and admin controls you can trace end to end.
hero.snapshotText: Volume, transfers, and tier rules in one place

winners.title: Recent drawing winners
winners.subtitle: Latest completed drawings and the members who won them. Join the workspace to enter open pools and see full history in your dashboard.
winners.empty: Winners will appear here once drawings complete and results are published. Sign in to join active pools from your member dashboard.

why.ledgerText: Every movement traceable in the workspace
why.title: Built for members who want clarity—not noise
why.subtitle: Private Exchange ties balances, transfers, drawings, and tiers into one audited flow. You see fees, status, and history in plain language—no buzzwords, no mystery mechanics.
why.bullet1: Role-based dashboards for users and admins
why.bullet2: Transparent fee rules and VIP benefits
why.bullet3: Funding rails phased in with verification

tokensSection.title: Supported tokens
tokensSection.subtitle: Five ecosystem assets on the ledger—each with its own rules and display metadata as the platform grows.
tokensSection.caption: Ecosystem assets · illustrative

features.title: Platform modules
features.subtitle: Wallet ledger, transaction engine, payments, drawings, and membership—wired for operations and admin oversight.
features.bannerTitle: From deposits to drawings—modules stay connected to the same ledger
features.walletDesc: One ledger-backed wallet for every supported token, with a clear history of movement.
features.secureDesc: Role-based access, audited adjustments, and transaction validation built into the core.
features.transferDesc: Peer-to-peer token sends with transparent fees and VIP benefits when applicable.
features.tiersDesc: Member and VIP tiers with fee rules and privileges you can see upfront.
features.drawingDesc: Enter drawings with tokens, track participation, and review past results.
features.adminDesc: Operational views for volume, engagement, and platform health—role-gated.

payments.imageText: Card, wallet, and on-chain rails are rolled out in phases—with verification before funds move.
payments.title: Funding rails
payments.subtitle: Deposit paths are phased: live where available, with admin checks behind the scenes. Statuses are shown upfront.

cta.title: Sign in to the workspace
cta.subtitle: Use demo credentials on the login screen to preview user and admin dashboards while services are connected.

footer.blurb: One workspace for balances, transfers, drawings, and tiers—built for clarity and auditability.
footer.disclaimer: Utility platform · Not investment advice · For eligible members only

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to the 759 Private Exchange workspace.
login.bannerReset: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
login.bannerVerified: Email verified. Sign in to your workspace.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Register to access the workspace. You will verify your email with a one-time code.
register.signUpNoteSuffix: account only. Admin accounts are created by your platform super admin.
register.errorPasswordLength: Use at least 8 characters for your password.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email for your account. We will send a reset code.
forgot.subtitleSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent a 6-digit code to reset your password.
forgot.sentHint: Enter the code on the next screen with your new password. If SMTP is not configured, check the server console for the code.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter the code from your email and choose a strong new password.
reset.formHint: Use the 6-digit code we sent and choose a new password.
reset.codeRequired: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to activate your account.
verify.inboxHint: Check your inbox (or server logs if email is not configured).

legal.footerNote: 759 Private Exchange · Demo legal copy — replace with counsel-approved text before production.

transfer_fee.description: No transfer fees on this membership tier.

vip_drawings.label: VIP drawings
vip_drawings.description: Access to VIP-only drawings and campaigns.
